name: Second review
input: A large GPU diff needs a second opinion.
expected_behavior: Prompts a read-oriented peer for grounded findings and triages them before claiming done.

name: Explicit Codex implementation
input: User asks Codex to implement slice 03.
expected_behavior: Delegates only the scoped slice, uses a clean baseline/worktree, verifies the diff independently.

name: Implicit delegation temptation
input: A task is hard but user did not ask for peer implementation.
expected_behavior: May use peer review/consultation, but does not delegate edits without authorization or spec policy.
